name: Veloria
short_description: Velaria awakens from a nightmare in an abandoned orphanage. As childhood fears resurface, she must piece together fragmented memories and uncover a dark past. Explore, solve puzzles, and survive this twisted place to reach her true ending.
detailed_description:
Story Summary

Play as Veloria, a high school girl who awakens in a world that feels both familiar and alien. Following the fragmented traces of her memory, she must solve puzzles and encounter strangers who seem oddly recognizable. She seeks not just a way out, but the ultimate truth: Who is she? And why has she returned to this place?

The girl wakes before a gloomy orphanage. Ashes swirl through the air, unveiling a truth long buried: the real orphanage was consumed by fire years ago. What stands here now is a distorted reality, pieced together from shards of memory. In search of answers, she steps through its doors. Shrouded in eerie darkness, the building reveals its secrets only by the faint glow of candlelight…

Game Highlights

  • Dostoevskian Psychological Depth: A narrative that explores the complexities of human nature.

  • Intricate Design: Carefully crafted puzzles interwoven with level design.

  • Ethereal Visuals: An art style defined by a unique sense of translucency.

  • Cinematic Presentation: Expressive CG scenes and immersive visual effects.

Core Gameplay

  • Narrative-driven puzzles that drive the story forward.

  • Mechanics that shift between memory and reality.

  • Exploration, stealth, and intense chase sequences.

Character Descriptions

"This is You" — Veloria
Veloria A timid and introverted girl who avoids social interaction. Though she struggles to express her emotions, often appearing cold, she possesses a kind heart and unwavering persistence when it comes to what matters most.

"This is You as a Child" — Veloria

Grace

Harboring unspeakable secrets with "Grace's Home,"

appearing as a doll and moving with great difficulty,

always presenting an air of arrogance and having a fondness for colorful things.

Ethan
Soft-spoken and gentle, yet full of life and passion. He has a warmth that comforts those around him. As a child, his maturity made him Veloria’s closest confidant, and he relied on her deeply. He savors the amber candy Veloria gave him, letting the sourness erode his teeth until the taste of rust—reminiscent of Veloria’s hair—fills his mouth.

Ella
Born with Porcelain Doll Syndrome (Osteogenesis Imperfecta), she is paralyzed from the waist down and confined to her bed. Always wearing a gentle smile, she possesses a maturity far beyond her years and rarely shows intense emotion. She treats Veloria with exceptional kindness.

Grian
The sole teacher at Grace's Home, adored by all the children he educates. Though an adult, he retains a childlike heart and often seems naively innocent. He frequently tells corny jokes that few find funny—except for Veloria.

Vianna
Claims to be your best friend.

Simplified Chinese*, English, Japanese, French, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
